name: che-apple-mail-mcp
description: Apple Mail MCP server — 44+ tools, IDD-style task enforcement + NSQL confirmation + .claude/.mail/ namespace (v2.9.0)。v2.9.0: archive-mail 與 confirmation-protocol skill Step 0 強制 TaskCreate bootstrap,靜默 skip = 違規。疊加 v2.8.0 namespace、v2.7.0 NSQL confirmation、v2.6.0 thread index、v2.5.0 composing format、v2.4.0 搜尋擴展。
